name: GoDomo - Campaign Analyst Agent
description: Monitors ad performance and proactively suggests budget reallocations to CMO

parameters.prompt:
As a CMO's analyst, review these campaign metrics and provide 3 specific budget reallocation recommendations:

KPIs: {{ $json.kpis }}

Outliers (over/under performing): {{ $json.outliers }}

Format:
1. [Channel/Campaign]: Shift $X from [underperformer] to [overperformer]
2. Reasoning in 1 sentence
3. Expected impact

parameters.title: Campaign Analysis - {{ $now.format('YYYY-MM-DD') }}

parameters.text:
📊 Daily Campaign Analysis Ready

**Key Metrics:**
• ROAS: {{ $json.kpis.avgROAS }}x avg
• Outliers: {{ $json.outliers.length }} campaigns

**Top Recommendation:**
{{ $json.insights.split('\n')[0] }}

📄 Full report: {{ $json.docUrl }}
